opportunities.title: Director, Technical Program Manager
opportunities.description: Build and lead Scale AI's TPM org from the ground up — team hiring, enterprise execution frameworks, cross-functional coordination between Engineering and Product leadership. Requires 10+ years TPM/engineering leadership, 4+ years people management. $241,600–$302,000 + equity, SF onsite 3x/week.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Databases
opportunities.description: Own roadmap execution for Anthropic's cross-region, multi-cloud database strategy. Manage external vendor relationships, drive dependencies and tradeoffs for critical infrastructure. Hybrid SF/Seattle. $365k–$435k.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Apps Platform
opportunities.description: Work across platform engineering teams and every product team, driving one cohesive roadmap for Anthropic's Apps Platform. Hybrid SF/Seattle. $365k–$435k.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Research
opportunities.description: Coordinate across Anthropic's research organization — managing roadmaps and dependencies between fundamental AI research teams and the infrastructure/product teams that build on their outputs. SF or NYC. $365k–$435k.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Launches
opportunities.description: Orchestrate cross-functional efforts to bring Anthropic's AI capabilities to the world — working closely with research teams and coordinating across engineering, product, infrastructure, and go-to-market. Requires deep technical knowledge to engage meaningfully with ML researchers. SF or NYC. $365k–$435k.

opportunities.title: Director, AI Enablement
opportunities.description: Lead Headspace's AI adoption strategy and operating model — AI governance frameworks, vendor evaluation, portfolio oversight, and org-wide AI fluency programs. Reports to COO. Remote US or hybrid SF (3 days/week). $177k–$250k SF range.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Privacy
opportunities.description: Senior TPM role driving cross-functional security, privacy, and compliance initiatives at the intersection of infrastructure, product, and policy. Requires 10+ years leading complex technical programs focused on infrastructure security, data privacy, or compliance. Director/senior level. Hybrid SF.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Safety Systems Engineering
opportunities.description: TPM responsible for streamlining the full safety governance process and integration of safety research into ChatGPT, API, and frontier models. Tracks safety research progress, risk tables, and oversees critical data infrastructure programs. Hybrid SF.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager – Adversarial Model Research
opportunities.description: TPM leading initiatives that test safety and robustness of OpenAI models through structured evaluation, coordinating across research and engineering teams to transform ambiguous risks into concrete research programs. $207K–$285K + equity. Hybrid SF.

opportunities.title: Program Manager, Alignment
opportunities.description: Supports OpenAI's alignment and safety ecosystem through program execution, relationship management, and operational ownership. Works with alignment leadership to run external-facing programs and partnerships. $162K–$240K + equity. Hybrid SF.

opportunities.title: Senior Staff AI Governance Engineer
opportunities.description: Drives lineage coverage and governance tooling adoption for AI/ML at Google scale, influencing partners across DeepMind and Product Areas to build joint roadmaps for AI governance compliance with relevant regulations. Requires 8+ years infrastructure experience, 5+ years technical leadership, 2+ years data governance. $248K–$349K + bonus + equity.

opportunities.title: VP of Data and AI
opportunities.description: Visionary VP to define and execute comprehensive data and AI strategy, leading teams of Data Engineers, Data Analysts, Data Scientists, AI Platform and ML Engineers. Requires 10+ years in AI/ML/data with 5+ years in senior leadership. Fully remote. $251K–$346K base + bonus.

opportunities.title: GRC and AI Governance – Senior Manager
opportunities.description: Cybersecurity GRC and AI Governance SME leading strategic advisory engagements for CISOs, CFOs, and PE deal teams. Designs AI governance frameworks, conducts AI risk assessments, guides clients through EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, and ISO 42001 compliance. 8+ years in cybersecurity GRC, privacy, or consulting.

opportunities.title: Director, AI Engineering
opportunities.description: Senior leadership role building and scaling a high-performing AI engineering team, setting technical vision for ML/LLM systems. Champions responsible AI practices including fairness, transparency, and regulatory compliance. 10+ years software/ML experience, 4+ years managing AI teams. Hybrid Dallas TX.

opportunities.title: Director, AI Governance, Automation & Analytics
opportunities.description: Own AlphaSense's end-to-end AI governance program: policy frameworks, risk classification, AI impact assessments, cross-functional governance council. Lead ISO 42001 certification, shadow AI containment, AI agent registry, and EU AI Act/NIST AI RMF compliance. Represent AlphaSense at industry forums on responsible AI. 8+ years security background with 3+ years leadership. Remote US.

opportunities.title: Director, Data and AI Governance
opportunities.description: Establish and lead enterprise-wide data management programs for safe, compliant, high-quality data and AI. Oversee Data Governance, AI Governance, and Data + AI Stewardship across R&D, Lab Operations, Commercial, and SG&A. Technical governance spanning quality, privacy, security, agentic automation, AI risk management, bias/fairness testing, evals, and vendor AI evaluation. Remote US.

opportunities.title: Principal, Programs and Policy (Tech and AI)
opportunities.description: Shape frontier AI policy and governance through grantmaking, advocacy, and ecosystem-building. Manage relationships across AI companies, VC, academia, and civil society; convene policymakers and researchers. Portfolio spans frontier AI, nuclear energy, and brain-computer interfaces. Hybrid SF (Tues/Wed). $171K–$214K.

opportunities.title: AI Governance Lead
opportunities.description: Consulting role establishing AI governance frameworks for regulated organizations. Define enterprise AI use policies, decision rights, accountability structures, and third-party vendor oversight. Integrate AI governance with existing data governance functions. 8–12 years in enterprise data governance or model risk management required. Remote, $100–$125/hr contract.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, AI Platform
opportunities.description: Senior or Principal TPM managing AI Platform programs at a biotech AI company. Oversee compute fleet scaling, unified storage strategy, cluster utilization metrics, ML software vendor partnerships, and researcher support programs. 8+ years in technology or infrastructure program management. In-person SF or Cambridge MA. $192K–$306K.

opportunities.title: Senior/Staff Technical Program Manager – AI & Autonomy
opportunities.description: Cross-functional program management leader responsible for planning and executing technical and integrated product milestones for vehicle platforms at Amazon's autonomous vehicle company. Posted April 2026.

opportunities.title: 1 Million Cups Ann Arbor
opportunities.description: Weekly Wednesday morning gathering (9 AM) where entrepreneurs present 6-minute pitches followed by 20 minutes of community Q&A and feedback. Free, open to all. A staple of the Ann Arbor startup community.

opportunities.title: AI Tinkerers Ann Arbor
opportunities.description: Hands-on community meetup for AI builders — lightning demos covering LLM agents, RAG systems, computer vision, robotics, and creative AI tools, with networking breaks. Free. Check the site for next scheduled date.

opportunities.title: AI Tinkerers SF: July GTM Engineering Track
opportunities.description: In-person SF meetup for AI engineers, founders, researchers, and product builders. July edition features GTM engineering track with live demos, technical Q&A, and networking. July 8, 2026, 6–9 PM PDT.

opportunities.title: AI & Tech Networking Event — Ascent Valley
opportunities.description: Curated startup networking event for founders, investors, and tech talent — AI, ML, and deep tech focus. July 8, 2026, 7 PM. San Francisco.

opportunities.title: Federated Intelligence in Production — NVIDIA FLARE
opportunities.description: Technical talks on operationalizing federated learning across distributed infrastructure, with production case studies from healthcare, finance, and automotive. Speakers from Rhino Federated Computing Platform and NVIDIA. 135 Constitution Drive, Menlo Park, CA.

opportunities.title: AWS Agentic AI Summit with MongoDB & Mastra
opportunities.description: Building Production-Ready AI Agents on AWS — presentations from MongoDB, Mastra, and AWS experts covering deployment strategies and live demonstrations. July 15, 2026, 4:00 PM PDT. Amazon AWS, 525 Market Street, San Francisco.

opportunities.title: GenAI Summit SF 2026
opportunities.description: Major generative AI conference at the Palace of Fine Arts. 15,000+ attendees, 200+ speakers from OpenAI, Anthropic, Google DeepMind, Stanford, Berkeley, MIT. Focuses on the shift to autonomous AI execution. July 18–19, 2026.

opportunities.title: ALIGN AI Executive Summit San Francisco
opportunities.description: Invite-only gathering for 150+ senior data and AI executives. Keynotes, expert panels, and roundtables on agentic AI, data governance, observability, infrastructure at scale, and measuring AI ROI. Free application for director-level+ non-vendor professionals.

opportunities.title: Senior Program Manager, Safety, Alignment, and Collaboration
opportunities.description: Support the VP of Safety and Alignment at DeepMind — bridge strategy with operational execution, own day-to-day operations, and lead annual/biannual planning processes for a geographically dispersed team across Mountain View, New York, London, and Zurich. 8+ years program management experience required. $252K–$274K + bonus + equity.

opportunities.title: Program Manager
opportunities.description: Lead impactful projects for the leading AI safety research and advocacy org — fellowships, workshops, publications, policy convenings, and community-building initiatives. Work with a small, mission-driven team. Strong program management skills and genuine interest in AI safety required. San Francisco.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Human Data Annotation
opportunities.description: Drive programs around human data acquisition and annotation for frontier AI model training and evaluation — coordinating across science, engineering, and operations teams. Cross-functional leadership at one of Europe's leading frontier AI labs. Remote-friendly; Mistral has US presence.

opportunities.title: Senior Project Manager, Generative AI Data Operations
opportunities.description: Manage generative AI data collection and annotation operations at scale — delivering high-quality training datasets for frontier AI models. Work with data contributors and internal teams to define quality standards, resolve operational blockers, and drive program execution. Remote.

opportunities.title: Robotics Data Quality Lead
opportunities.description: Define and own end-to-end data quality strategy across robotics data collection and annotation workflows — video, sensor, teleoperation outputs, and annotations for AI model training. Lead a team of quality specialists, set training programs, serve as primary escalation point for quality issues, and present reports to clients. Experience in large-scale data operations, robotics, or AI/ML required.

opportunities.title: Data Operations Manager
opportunities.description: Oversee product operations cycles for AI training data at a leading RLHF and human feedback platform. Collaborate cross-functionally to establish performance metrics, manage communications around data pipelines, and resolve operational roadblocks for data quality at scale. Apply via careers@surgehq.ai with resume and case study.

opportunities.title: Technical Program Manager, Data Operations Lead
opportunities.description: Lead data operations for the Perception Data and Labeling team — overseeing the training and evaluation data that powers perception ML models for autonomous vehicles. Manage labeling pipelines, data quality programs, and cross-functional dependencies between data operations and ML research. Amazon's autonomous vehicle company.

opportunities.title: Subsurface 2026: The Open Data and AI Conference – Call for Speakers
opportunities.description: Virtual conference on open data lakehouse architecture and agentic AI systems. Accepts talks on Apache Iceberg, Arrow, Spark, and data-driven AI systems. Shares successes, failures, and key lessons from modern data practices. Conference Sep 30–Oct 2, 2026. CFP closes July 17 at 11:59 PM PT.

opportunities.title: Global Data & AI Virtual Tech Conference 2026 – Call for Speakers
opportunities.description: Virtual conference (August 22–24, 2026) with tracks on AI & Data Innovations, Enterprise Data Strategy & Leadership, and Future of Work & AI in Society. Accepts talks, lightning talks, workshops, panels. All speakers get free conference access.

opportunities.title: Conf42 AI Agents 2026 – Call for Papers
opportunities.description: Online conference (September 24, 2026) on AI agents and autonomous systems — architectures, tool use, reasoning, multi-agent coordination, ethics, safety, and reliability. CFP open through August 24, 2026. All experience levels welcome.
